Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Speak to the fortune-teller at Club Escapade to learn your future. A positive reading will affect the next journey you make into Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}The results of a fortune {f 0 1 2}will only last for the day you receive the fortune{f 0 1 27}. You have a limited number of readings available to you in a given month which resets each full moon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}The fortune-teller will not be able to predict your future on nights when the moon is full, so you will have to plan your visits around the phase of the moon.[n]{f 1 1}
